1010	    /// Get a new Timestamp from a Zenoh [`Session`].
1011	    ///
1012	    /// The returned timestamp has the current time, with the Session's runtime [`ZenohId`].
1013	    ///
1014	    /// # Examples
1015	    /// ### Get a new timestamp
1016	    /// ```
1017	    /// # #[tokio::main]
1018	    /// # async fn main() {
1019	    ///
1020	    /// let session = zenoh::open(zenoh::Config::default()).await.unwrap();
1021	    /// let timestamp = session.new_timestamp();
1022	    /// # }
1023	    /// ```
1024	    pub fn new_timestamp(&self) -> Timestamp {
1025	        match self.0.runtime.hlc() {
1026	            Some(hlc) => hlc.new_timestamp(),
1027	            None => {
1028	                // Called when the runtime is not initialized with an HLC.
1029	                // UNIX_EPOCH returns a Timespec::zero(); unwrap should be permissible here.
1030	                let now = SystemTime::now().duration_since(UNIX_EPOCH).unwrap().into();
1031	                Timestamp::new(now, self.zid().into())
1032	            }
1033	        }
1034	    }
1035	}

1429	impl Session {
1430	    #[allow(clippy::new_ret_no_self)]
1431	    pub(super) fn new(
1432	        config: Config,
1433	        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")] shm_clients: Option<Arc<ShmClientStorage>>,
1434	    ) -> impl Resolve<ZResult<Session>> {
1435	        ResolveFuture::new(async move {
1436	            tracing::debug!("Config: {:?}", &config);
1437	            let aggregated_subscribers = config.0.aggregation().subscribers().clone();
1438	            let aggregated_publishers = config.0.aggregation().publishers().clone();
1439	            #[allow(unused_mut)] // Required for shared-memory
1440	            let mut runtime = RuntimeBuilder::new(config);
1441	            #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
1442	            {
1443	                runtime = runtime.shm_clients(shm_clients);
1444	            }
1445	            let mut runtime = runtime.build().await?;
1446	
1447	            let session = Self::init(
1448	                runtime.clone().into(),
1449	                aggregated_subscribers,
1450	                aggregated_publishers,
1451	            )
1452	            .await;
1453	            runtime.start().await?;
1454	            Ok(session)
1455	        })
1456	    }
1457	
1458	    pub(crate) fn runtime(&self) -> &GenericRuntime {
1459	        &self.0.runtime
1460	    }
1461	
1462	    pub(crate) fn queries_default_timeout(&self) -> Duration {
1463	        Duration::from_millis(self.0.runtime.get_config().queries_default_timeout_ms())
1464	    }

1466	    pub(crate) fn declare_prefix<'a>(
1467	        &'a self,
1468	        prefix: &'a str,
1469	        force: bool,
1470	    ) -> impl Resolve<ZResult<Option<ExprId>>> + 'a {
1471	        ResolveClosure::new(move || {
1472	            trace!("declare_prefix({:?})", prefix);
1473	            let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
1474	            let primitives = state.primitives()?;
1475	            match state
1476	                .local_resources
1477	                .iter_mut()
1478	                .find(|(_expr_id, res)| res.resource.name() == prefix)
1479	            {
1480	                Some((expr_id, res)) if force || res.declared => {
1481	                    res.count += 1;
1482	                    Ok(Some(*expr_id))
1483	                }
1484	                Some(_) => Ok(None),
1485	                None => {
1486	                    let expr_id = state.expr_id_counter.fetch_add(1, Ordering::SeqCst);
1487	                    let mut res = Resource::new(Box::from(prefix));
1488	                    if let Resource::Node(res_node) = &mut res {
1489	                        for kind in [
1490	                            SubscriberKind::Subscriber,
1491	                            SubscriberKind::LivelinessSubscriber,
1492	                        ] {
1493	                            for sub in state.subscribers(kind).values() {
1494	                                if res_node.key_expr.intersects(&sub.key_expr) {
1495	                                    res_node.subscribers_mut(kind).push(sub.clone());
1496	                                }
1497	                            }
1498	                        }
1499	                    }
1500	                    state.local_resources.insert(
1501	                        expr_id,
1502	                        LocalResource {
1503	                            resource: res,
1504	                            declared: false,
1505	                            count: 1,
1506	                        },
1507	                    );
1508	                    drop(state);
1509	                    primitives.send_declare(&mut Declare {
1510	                        interest_id: None,
1511	                        ext_qos: declare::ext::QoSType::DECLARE,
1512	                        ext_tstamp: None,
1513	                        ext_nodeid: declare::ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
1514	                        body: DeclareBody::DeclareKeyExpr(DeclareKeyExpr {
1515	                            id: expr_id,
1516	                            wire_expr: WireExpr {
1517	                                scope: 0,
1518	                                suffix: prefix.to_owned().into(),
1519	                                mapping: Mapping::Sender,
1520	                            },
1521	                        }),
1522	                    });
1523	                    let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
1524	                    if let Some(res) = state.local_resources.get_mut(&expr_id) {
1525	                        res.declared = true;
1526	                    }
1527	                    Ok(Some(expr_id))
1528	                }
1529	            }
1530	        })
1531	    }
1532	
1533	    pub(crate) fn undeclare_prefix(&self, expr_id: ExprId) -> ZResult<()> {
1534	        trace!("undedeclare_prefix({expr_id})");
1535	        let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
1536	        let primitives = state.primitives()?;
1537	        if let Some(entry) = state.local_resources.get_mut(&expr_id) {
1538	            entry.count -= 1;
1539	            if entry.count == 0 {
1540	                state.local_resources.remove(&expr_id);
1541	                drop(state);
1542	                primitives.send_declare(&mut Declare {
1543	                    interest_id: None,
1544	                    ext_qos: declare::ext::QoSType::DECLARE,
1545	                    ext_tstamp: None,
1546	                    ext_nodeid: declare::ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
1547	                    body: DeclareBody::UndeclareKeyExpr(UndeclareKeyExpr { id: expr_id }),
1548	                });
1549	            }
1550	            Ok(())
1551	        } else {
1552	            bail!("Unknown prefix id: {expr_id} for session: {}", self.zid())
1553	        }
1554	    }
1555	
1556	    pub(crate) fn declare_publisher_inner(
1557	        &self,
1558	        key_expr: KeyExpr,
1559	        destination: Locality,
1560	    ) -> ZResult<EntityId> {
1561	        let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
1562	        if state.primitives.is_none() {
1563	            return Err(SessionClosedError.into());
1564	        }
1565	        tracing::trace!("declare_publisher({:?})", key_expr);
1566	        let id = self.0.runtime.next_id();
1567	
1568	        let mut pub_state = PublisherState {
1569	            id,
1570	            remote_id: id,
1571	            key_expr: key_expr.clone().into_owned(),
1572	            destination,
1573	        };
1574	
1575	        let declared_pub = (destination != Locality::SessionLocal)
1576	            .then(|| {
1577	                match state
1578	                    .aggregated_publishers
1579	                    .iter()
1580	                    .find(|s| s.includes(&key_expr))
1581	                {
1582	                    Some(join_pub) => {
1583	                        if let Some(joined_pub) = state.publishers.values().find(|p| {
1584	                            p.destination != Locality::SessionLocal
1585	                                && join_pub.includes(&p.key_expr)
1586	                        }) {
1587	                            pub_state.remote_id = joined_pub.remote_id;
1588	                            None
1589	                        } else {
1590	                            Some(join_pub.clone().into())
1591	                        }
1592	                    }
1593	                    None => {
1594	                        if let Some(twin_pub) = state.publishers.values().find(|p| {
1595	                            p.destination != Locality::SessionLocal && p.key_expr == key_expr
1596	                        }) {
1597	                            pub_state.remote_id = twin_pub.remote_id;
1598	                            None
1599	                        } else {
1600	                            Some(key_expr.clone())
1601	                        }
1602	                    }
1603	                }
1604	            })
1605	            .flatten();
1606	
1607	        state.publishers.insert(id, pub_state);
1608	
1609	        if let Some(res) = declared_pub {
1610	            let primitives = state.primitives()?;
1611	            drop(state);
1612	            primitives.send_interest(&mut Interest {
1613	                id,
1614	                mode: InterestMode::CurrentFuture,
1615	                options: InterestOptions::KEYEXPRS + InterestOptions::SUBSCRIBERS,
1616	                wire_expr: Some(res.to_wire(self).to_owned()),
1617	                ext_qos: network::ext::QoSType::DEFAULT,
1618	                ext_tstamp: None,
1619	                ext_nodeid: interest::ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
1620	            });
1621	        }
1622	        Ok(id)
1623	    }
1624	
1625	    pub(crate) fn undeclare_publisher_inner(&self, pid: Id) -> ZResult<()> {
1626	        let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
1627	        let Ok(primitives) = state.primitives() else {
1628	            return Ok(());
1629	        };
1630	        if let Some(pub_state) = state.publishers.remove(&pid) {
1631	            trace!("undeclare_publisher({:?})", pub_state);
1632	            if pub_state.destination != Locality::SessionLocal {
1633	                // Note: there might be several publishers on the same KeyExpr.
1634	                // Before calling forget_publishers(key_expr), check if this was the last one.
1635	                if !state.publishers.values().any(|p| {
1636	                    p.destination != Locality::SessionLocal && p.remote_id == pub_state.remote_id
1637	                }) {
1638	                    drop(state);
1639	                    primitives.send_interest(&mut Interest {
1640	                        id: pub_state.remote_id,
1641	                        mode: InterestMode::Final,
1642	                        // Note: InterestMode::Final options are undefined in the current protocol specification,
1643	                        //       they are initialized here for internal use by local egress interceptors.
1644	                        options: InterestOptions::SUBSCRIBERS,
1645	                        wire_expr: None,
1646	                        ext_qos: interest::ext::QoSType::DEFAULT,
1647	                        ext_tstamp: None,
1648	                        ext_nodeid: interest::ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
1649	                    });
1650	                }
1651	            }
1652	            Ok(())
1653	        } else {
1654	            Err(zerror!("Unable to find publisher").into())
1655	        }
1656	    }

1658	    pub(crate) fn declare_querier_inner(
1659	        &self,
1660	        key_expr: KeyExpr,
1661	        destination: Locality,
1662	    ) -> ZResult<EntityId> {
1663	        tracing::trace!("declare_querier({:?})", key_expr);
1664	        let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
1665	        let primitives = state.primitives()?;
1666	        let id = self.0.runtime.next_id();
1667	        let declared_querier = state.register_querier(id, &key_expr, destination);
1668	        if let Some(res) = declared_querier {
1669	            drop(state);
1670	            primitives.send_interest(&mut Interest {
1671	                id,
1672	                mode: InterestMode::CurrentFuture,
1673	                options: InterestOptions::KEYEXPRS + InterestOptions::QUERYABLES,
1674	                wire_expr: Some(res.to_wire(self).to_owned()),
1675	                ext_qos: interest::ext::QoSType::DEFAULT,
1676	                ext_tstamp: None,
1677	                ext_nodeid: interest::ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
1678	            });
1679	        }
1680	        Ok(id)
1681	    }

1683	    pub(crate) fn undeclare_querier_inner(&self, querier_id: Id) -> ZResult<()> {
1684	        let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
1685	        let Ok(primitives) = state.primitives() else {
1686	            return Ok(());
1687	        };
1688	        if let Some(querier_state) = state.queriers.remove(&querier_id) {
1689	            trace!("undeclare_querier({:?})", querier_state);
1690	            // Remove all pending queries from this querier. The removed queries own
1691	            // the user callbacks (including completion/drop callbacks); they must be
1692	            // dropped *after* the state lock is released below, otherwise a completion
1693	            // callback that re-enters the `Session` would deadlock re-acquiring the lock.
1694	            let removed_query_ids: Vec<_> = state
1695	                .queries
1696	                .iter()
1697	                .filter(|(_, q)| q.querier_id == Some(querier_id))
1698	                .map(|(id, _)| *id)
1699	                .collect();
1700	            let removed_queries = removed_query_ids
1701	                .into_iter()
1702	                .filter_map(|id| state.queries.remove(&id))
1703	                .collect::<Vec<_>>();
1704	            // Note: there might be several queriers on the same KeyExpr.
1705	            // Before calling forget_queriers(key_expr), check if this was the last one.
1706	            let send_final = querier_state.destination != Locality::SessionLocal
1707	                && !state.queriers.values().any(|p| {
1708	                    p.destination != Locality::SessionLocal
1709	                        && p.remote_id == querier_state.remote_id
1710	                });
1711	            drop(state);
1712	            // Lock released: now it is safe to drop the removed queries (and their
1713	            // callbacks, which may re-enter the `Session`).
1714	            drop(removed_queries);
1715	            if send_final {
1716	                primitives.send_interest(&mut Interest {
1717	                    id: querier_state.remote_id,
1718	                    mode: InterestMode::Final,
1719	                    options: InterestOptions::empty(),
1720	                    wire_expr: None,
1721	                    ext_qos: interest::ext::QoSType::DEFAULT,
1722	                    ext_tstamp: None,
1723	                    ext_nodeid: interest::ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
1724	                });
1725	            }
1726	            Ok(())
1727	        } else {
1728	            Err(zerror!("Unable to find querier").into())
1729	        }
1730	    }
1731	
1732	    fn register_callback_drop_notifier<T>(
1733	        &self,
1734	        external_notifier: Option<SyncGroupNotifier>,
1735	        callback: &mut Callback<T>,
1736	    ) where
1737	        T: CallbackParameter,
1738	    {
1739	        let n = self.0.callbacks_drop_sync_group.notifier();
1740	        callback.set_on_drop(move || {
1741	            drop(external_notifier);
1742	            drop(n);
1743	        });
1744	    }

1746	    #[allow(unused_mut)] // for callback drop on undeclare
1747	    pub(crate) fn declare_subscriber_inner(
1748	        &self,
1749	        key_expr: &KeyExpr,
1750	        origin: Locality,
1751	        mut callback: Callback<Sample>,
1752	        callback_drop_notifier: Option<SyncGroupNotifier>,
1753	    ) -> ZResult<Arc<SubscriberState>> {
1754	        tracing::trace!("declare_subscriber({:?})", key_expr);
1755	        let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
1756	        let primitives = state.primitives()?;
1757	        self.register_callback_drop_notifier(callback_drop_notifier, &mut callback);
1758	        let id = self.0.runtime.next_id();
1759	        let (sub_state, declared_sub) = state.register_subscriber(id, key_expr, origin, callback);
1760	        if let Some(key_expr) = declared_sub {
1761	            drop(state);
1762	            let wire_expr = key_expr.to_wire(self).to_owned();
1763	            primitives.send_declare(&mut Declare {
1764	                interest_id: None,
1765	                ext_qos: declare::ext::QoSType::DECLARE,
1766	                ext_tstamp: None,
1767	                ext_nodeid: declare::ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
1768	                body: DeclareBody::DeclareSubscriber(DeclareSubscriber { id, wire_expr }),
1769	            });
1770	            let state = zread!(self.0.state);
1771	            self.update_matching_status(&state, &key_expr, MatchingStatusType::Subscribers, true)
1772	        } else if origin == Locality::SessionLocal {
1773	            self.update_matching_status(&state, key_expr, MatchingStatusType::Subscribers, true)
1774	        }
1775	
1776	        Ok(sub_state)
1777	    }

1779	    pub(crate) fn undeclare_subscriber_inner(&self, sid: Id, kind: SubscriberKind) -> ZResult<()> {
1780	        let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
1781	        let Ok(primitives) = state.primitives() else {
1782	            return Ok(());
1783	        };
1784	        if let Some(sub_state) = state.subscribers_mut(kind).remove(&sid) {
1785	            trace!("undeclare_subscriber({:?})", sub_state);
1786	            for res in state
1787	                .local_resources
1788	                .values_mut()
1789	                .filter_map(LocalResource::as_node_mut)
1790	            {
1791	                res.subscribers_mut(kind)
1792	                    .retain(|sub| sub.id != sub_state.id);
1793	            }
1794	            for res in state
1795	                .remote_resources
1796	                .values_mut()
1797	                .filter_map(Resource::as_node_mut)
1798	            {
1799	                res.subscribers_mut(kind)
1800	                    .retain(|sub| sub.id != sub_state.id);
1801	            }
1802	
1803	            match kind {
1804	                SubscriberKind::Subscriber => {
1805	                    if sub_state.origin != Locality::SessionLocal {
1806	                        // Note: there might be several Subscribers on the same KeyExpr.
1807	                        // Before calling forget_subscriber(key_expr), check if this was the last one.
1808	                        if !state.subscribers(kind).values().any(|s| {
1809	                            s.origin != Locality::SessionLocal && s.remote_id == sub_state.remote_id
1810	                        }) {
1811	                            drop(state);
1812	                            primitives.send_declare(&mut Declare {
1813	                                interest_id: None,
1814	                                ext_qos: declare::ext::QoSType::DECLARE,
1815	                                ext_tstamp: None,
1816	                                ext_nodeid: declare::ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
1817	                                body: DeclareBody::UndeclareSubscriber(UndeclareSubscriber {
1818	                                    id: sub_state.remote_id,
1819	                                    ext_wire_expr: WireExprType {
1820	                                        wire_expr: WireExpr::empty(),
1821	                                    },
1822	                                }),
1823	                            });
1824	                            let state = zread!(self.0.state);
1825	                            self.update_matching_status(
1826	                                &state,
1827	                                &sub_state.key_expr,
1828	                                MatchingStatusType::Subscribers,
1829	                                false,
1830	                            );
1831	                            drop(state);
1832	                        } else {
1833	                            drop(state);
1834	                        }
1835	                    } else {
1836	                        drop(state);
1837	                        let state = zread!(self.0.state);
1838	                        self.update_matching_status(
1839	                            &state,
1840	                            &sub_state.key_expr,
1841	                            MatchingStatusType::Subscribers,
1842	                            false,
1843	                        );
1844	                        drop(state);
1845	                    }
1846	                }
1847	                SubscriberKind::LivelinessSubscriber => {
1848	                    let primitives = state.primitives()?;
1849	                    drop(state);
1850	
1851	                    primitives.send_interest(&mut Interest {
1852	                        id: sub_state.id,
1853	                        mode: InterestMode::Final,
1854	                        // Note: InterestMode::Final options are undefined in the current protocol specification,
1855	                        //       they are initialized here for internal use by local egress interceptors.
1856	                        options: InterestOptions::TOKENS,
1857	                        wire_expr: None,
1858	                        ext_qos: interest::ext::QoSType::DEFAULT,
1859	                        ext_tstamp: None,
1860	                        ext_nodeid: interest::ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
1861	                    });
1862	                }
1863	            }
1864	
1865	            // We need to ensure that the `state` lock is no longer held at this point to allow
1866	            // eventual undeclaration of subscriber key expression which will happen automatically
1867	            // on `sub_state` drop, for background subscribers.
1868	            Ok(())
1869	        } else {
1870	            Err(zerror!("Unable to find subscriber").into())
1871	        }
1872	    }

1874	    #[allow(unused_mut)] // for callback drop on undeclare
1875	    pub(crate) fn declare_queryable_inner(
1876	        &self,
1877	        key_expr: &KeyExpr,
1878	        complete: bool,
1879	        origin: Locality,
1880	        mut callback: Callback<Query>,
1881	        callback_drop_notifier: Option<SyncGroupNotifier>,
1882	    ) -> ZResult<Arc<QueryableState>> {
1883	        tracing::trace!("declare_queryable({:?})", key_expr);
1884	        let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
1885	        let primitives = state.primitives()?;
1886	        self.register_callback_drop_notifier(callback_drop_notifier, &mut callback);
1887	        let id = self.0.runtime.next_id();
1888	        let qable_state = Arc::new(QueryableState {
1889	            id,
1890	            key_expr: key_expr.clone().into_owned(),
1891	            complete,
1892	            origin,
1893	            callback,
1894	        });
1895	
1896	        state.queryables.insert(id, qable_state.clone());
1897	        if origin != Locality::SessionLocal {
1898	            drop(state);
1899	            let qabl_info = QueryableInfoType {
1900	                complete,
1901	                distance: 0,
1902	            };
1903	            let wire_expr = key_expr.to_wire(self).to_owned();
1904	            primitives.send_declare(&mut Declare {
1905	                interest_id: None,
1906	                ext_qos: declare::ext::QoSType::DECLARE,
1907	                ext_tstamp: None,
1908	                ext_nodeid: declare::ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
1909	                body: DeclareBody::DeclareQueryable(DeclareQueryable {
1910	                    id,
1911	                    wire_expr,
1912	                    ext_info: qabl_info,
1913	                }),
1914	            });
1915	        } else {
1916	            drop(state);
1917	        }
1918	
1919	        let state = zread!(self.0.state);
1920	        self.update_matching_status(
1921	            &state,
1922	            key_expr,
1923	            MatchingStatusType::Queryables(complete),
1924	            true,
1925	        );
1926	
1927	        Ok(qable_state)
1928	    }

1930	    pub(crate) fn close_queryable(&self, qid: Id) -> ZResult<()> {
1931	        let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
1932	        let Ok(primitives) = state.primitives() else {
1933	            return Ok(());
1934	        };
1935	        if let Some(qable_state) = state.queryables.remove(&qid) {
1936	            trace!("undeclare_queryable({:?})", qable_state);
1937	            if qable_state.origin != Locality::SessionLocal {
1938	                drop(state);
1939	                primitives.send_declare(&mut Declare {
1940	                    interest_id: None,
1941	                    ext_qos: declare::ext::QoSType::DECLARE,
1942	                    ext_tstamp: None,
1943	                    ext_nodeid: declare::ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
1944	                    body: DeclareBody::UndeclareQueryable(UndeclareQueryable {
1945	                        id: qable_state.id,
1946	                        ext_wire_expr: WireExprType {
1947	                            wire_expr: WireExpr::empty(),
1948	                        },
1949	                    }),
1950	                });
1951	            } else {
1952	                drop(state);
1953	            }
1954	            let state = zread!(self.0.state);
1955	            self.update_matching_status(
1956	                &state,
1957	                &qable_state.key_expr,
1958	                MatchingStatusType::Queryables(qable_state.complete),
1959	                false,
1960	            );
1961	            drop(state);
1962	
1963	            // We need to ensure that the `state` lock is no longer held at this point to allow
1964	            // eventual undeclaration of queryable key expression which will happen automatically
1965	            // on `qable_state` drop for background queryables.
1966	            Ok(())
1967	        } else {
1968	            Err(zerror!("Unable to find queryable").into())
1969	        }
1970	    }

1989	    #[allow(unused_mut)] // for callback drop on undeclare
1990	    pub(crate) fn declare_liveliness_subscriber_inner(
1991	        &self,
1992	        key_expr: &KeyExpr,
1993	        origin: Locality,
1994	        history: bool,
1995	        mut callback: Callback<Sample>,
1996	        callback_drop_notifier: Option<SyncGroupNotifier>,
1997	    ) -> ZResult<Arc<SubscriberState>> {
1998	        trace!("declare_liveliness_subscriber({:?})", key_expr);
1999	        let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
2000	        let primitives = state.primitives()?;
2001	        self.register_callback_drop_notifier(callback_drop_notifier, &mut callback);
2002	        let id = self.0.runtime.next_id();
2003	        let sub_state = SubscriberState {
2004	            id,
2005	            remote_id: id,
2006	            key_expr: key_expr.clone().into_owned(),
2007	            origin,
2008	            callback: callback.clone(),
2009	            history,
2010	        };
2011	
2012	        let sub_state = Arc::new(sub_state);
2013	
2014	        state
2015	            .subscribers_mut(SubscriberKind::LivelinessSubscriber)
2016	            .insert(sub_state.id, sub_state.clone());
2017	
2018	        for res in state
2019	            .local_resources
2020	            .values_mut()
2021	            .filter_map(LocalResource::as_node_mut)
2022	        {
2023	            if key_expr.intersects(&res.key_expr) {
2024	                res.subscribers_mut(SubscriberKind::LivelinessSubscriber)
2025	                    .push(sub_state.clone());
2026	            }
2027	        }
2028	
2029	        for res in state
2030	            .remote_resources
2031	            .values_mut()
2032	            .filter_map(Resource::as_node_mut)
2033	        {
2034	            if key_expr.intersects(&res.key_expr) {
2035	                res.subscribers_mut(SubscriberKind::LivelinessSubscriber)
2036	                    .push(sub_state.clone());
2037	            }
2038	        }
2039	
2040	        let known_tokens = if history {
2041	            state
2042	                .remote_tokens
2043	                .values()
2044	                .filter(|token| key_expr.intersects(token))
2045	                .cloned()
2046	                .collect::<Vec<KeyExpr<'static>>>()
2047	        } else {
2048	            vec![]
2049	        };
2050	
2051	        drop(state);
2052	
2053	        if !known_tokens.is_empty() {
2054	            self.0
2055	                .task_controller
2056	                .spawn_with_rt(zenoh_runtime::ZRuntime::Net, async move {
2057	                    for token in known_tokens {
2058	                        callback.call(Sample {
2059	                            key_expr: token,
2060	                            payload: ZBytes::new(),
2061	                            kind: SampleKind::Put,
2062	                            encoding: Encoding::default(),
2063	                            timestamp: None,
2064	                            qos: QoS::default(),
2065	                            #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2066	                            reliability: Reliability::Reliable,
2067	                            #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2068	                            source_info: None,
2069	                            attachment: None,
2070	                        });
2071	                    }
2072	                });
2073	        }
2074	
2075	        primitives.send_interest(&mut Interest {
2076	            id,
2077	            mode: if history {
2078	                InterestMode::CurrentFuture
2079	            } else {
2080	                InterestMode::Future
2081	            },
2082	            options: InterestOptions::KEYEXPRS + InterestOptions::TOKENS,
2083	            wire_expr: Some(key_expr.to_wire(self).to_owned()),
2084	            ext_qos: interest::ext::QoSType::INTEREST,
2085	            ext_tstamp: None,
2086	            ext_nodeid: interest::ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
2087	        });
2088	
2089	        Ok(sub_state)
2090	    }
2091	
2092	    pub(crate) fn undeclare_liveliness(&self, tid: Id) -> ZResult<()> {
2093	        let Ok(primitives) = zread!(self.0.state).primitives() else {
2094	            return Ok(());
2095	        };
2096	        trace!("undeclare_liveliness({:?})", tid);
2097	        primitives.send_declare(&mut Declare {
2098	            interest_id: None,
2099	            ext_qos: ext::QoSType::DECLARE,
2100	            ext_tstamp: None,
2101	            ext_nodeid: ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
2102	            body: DeclareBody::UndeclareToken(UndeclareToken {
2103	                id: tid,
2104	                ext_wire_expr: WireExprType::null(),
2105	            }),
2106	        });
2107	        Ok(())
2108	    }

2110	    #[allow(unused_mut)] // for callback drop on undeclare
2111	    pub(crate) fn declare_matches_listener_inner(
2112	        &self,
2113	        key_expr: &KeyExpr,
2114	        destination: Locality,
2115	        match_type: MatchingStatusType,
2116	        mut callback: Callback<MatchingStatus>,
2117	        callback_sync_group_notifier: Option<SyncGroupNotifier>,
2118	    ) -> ZResult<Arc<MatchingListenerState>> {
2119	        let id = self.0.runtime.next_id();
2120	        tracing::trace!(
2121	            "declare_matches_listener({:?}: {:?}) => {id}",
2122	            match_type,
2123	            key_expr
2124	        );
2125	        let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
2126	        if state.primitives.is_none() {
2127	            return Err(SessionClosedError.into());
2128	        }
2129	        self.register_callback_drop_notifier(callback_sync_group_notifier, &mut callback);
2130	        let listener_state = Arc::new(MatchingListenerState {
2131	            id,
2132	            current: Mutex::new(false),
2133	            destination,
2134	            key_expr: key_expr.clone().into_owned(),
2135	            match_type,
2136	            callback,
2137	        });
2138	        state.matching_listeners.insert(id, listener_state.clone());
2139	        drop(state);
2140	        match listener_state.current.lock() {
2141	            Ok(mut current) => {
2142	                if self
2143	                    .matching_status(key_expr, listener_state.destination, match_type)
2144	                    .map(|s| s.matching())
2145	                    .unwrap_or(true)
2146	                {
2147	                    *current = true;
2148	                    listener_state
2149	                        .callback
2150	                        .call(MatchingStatus { matching: true });
2151	                }
2152	            }
2153	            Err(e) => tracing::error!("Error trying to acquire MatchingListener lock: {}", e),
2154	        }
2155	        Ok(listener_state)
2156	    }
2157	
2158	    fn matching_status_local(
2159	        &self,
2160	        key_expr: &KeyExpr,
2161	        matching_type: MatchingStatusType,
2162	    ) -> MatchingStatus {
2163	        let state = zread!(self.0.state);
2164	        let matching = match matching_type {
2165	            MatchingStatusType::Subscribers => state
2166	                .subscribers(SubscriberKind::Subscriber)
2167	                .values()
2168	                .any(|s| s.key_expr.intersects(key_expr)),
2169	            MatchingStatusType::Queryables(false) => state
2170	                .queryables
2171	                .values()
2172	                .any(|q| q.key_expr.intersects(key_expr)),
2173	            MatchingStatusType::Queryables(true) => state
2174	                .queryables
2175	                .values()
2176	                .any(|q| q.complete && q.key_expr.includes(key_expr)),
2177	        };
2178	        MatchingStatus { matching }
2179	    }
2180	
2181	    fn matching_status_remote(
2182	        &self,
2183	        key_expr: &KeyExpr,
2184	        destination: Locality,
2185	        matching_type: MatchingStatusType,
2186	    ) -> ZResult<MatchingStatus> {
2187	        Ok(self.0.runtime.matching_status_remote(
2188	            key_expr,
2189	            destination,
2190	            matching_type,
2191	            *self.0.face_id.get().unwrap(),
2192	        ))
2193	    }
2194	
2195	    pub(crate) fn matching_status(
2196	        &self,
2197	        key_expr: &KeyExpr,
2198	        destination: Locality,
2199	        matching_type: MatchingStatusType,
2200	    ) -> ZResult<MatchingStatus> {
2201	        match destination {
2202	            Locality::SessionLocal => Ok(self.matching_status_local(key_expr, matching_type)),
2203	            Locality::Remote => self.matching_status_remote(key_expr, destination, matching_type),
2204	            Locality::Any => {
2205	                let local_match = self.matching_status_local(key_expr, matching_type);
2206	                if local_match.matching() {
2207	                    Ok(local_match)
2208	                } else {
2209	                    self.matching_status_remote(key_expr, destination, matching_type)
2210	                }
2211	            }
2212	        }
2213	    }
2214	
2215	    pub(crate) fn update_matching_status(
2216	        &self,
2217	        state: &SessionState,
2218	        key_expr: &KeyExpr,
2219	        match_type: MatchingStatusType,
2220	        status_value: bool,
2221	    ) {
2222	        for msub in state.matching_listeners.values() {
2223	            if msub.is_matching(key_expr, match_type) {
2224	                // Cannot hold session lock when calling tables (matching_status())
2225	                // TODO: check which ZRuntime should be used
2226	                self.0
2227	                    .task_controller
2228	                    .spawn_with_rt(zenoh_runtime::ZRuntime::Net, {
2229	                        let session = self.downgrade();
2230	                        let msub = msub.clone();
2231	                        async move {
2232	                            match msub.current.lock() {
2233	                                Ok(mut current) => {
2234	                                    if *current != status_value {
2235	                                        if let Ok(status) = session.matching_status(
2236	                                            &msub.key_expr,
2237	                                            msub.destination,
2238	                                            msub.match_type,
2239	                                        ) {
2240	                                            if status.matching() == status_value {
2241	                                                *current = status_value;
2242	                                                let callback = msub.callback.clone();
2243	                                                callback.call(status)
2244	                                            }
2245	                                        }
2246	                                    }
2247	                                }
2248	                                Err(e) => {
2249	                                    tracing::error!(
2250	                                        "Error trying to acquire MatchingListener lock: {}",
2251	                                        e
2252	                                    );
2253	                                }
2254	                            }
2255	                        }
2256	                    });
2257	            }
2258	        }
2259	    }

2269	        };
2270	
2271	        if let Some(state) = state {

2273	            Ok(())
2274	        } else {
2275	            Err(zerror!("Unable to find MatchingListener").into())
2276	        }

2280	    pub(crate) fn declare_transport_events_listener_inner(
2281	        &self,
2282	        mut callback: Callback<TransportEvent>,
2283	        history: bool,
2284	        callback_drop_notifier: Option<SyncGroupNotifier>,
2285	    ) -> ZResult<Arc<TransportEventsListenerState>> {
2286	        let id = self.runtime().next_id();
2287	        trace!("declare_transport_events_listener_inner() => {id}");
2288	        let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
2289	        if state.primitives.is_none() {
2290	            return Err(SessionClosedError.into());
2291	        }
2292	        self.register_callback_drop_notifier(callback_drop_notifier, &mut callback);
2293	        let listener_state = Arc::new(TransportEventsListenerState { id, callback });
2294	
2295	        state
2296	            .transport_events_listeners
2297	            .insert(id, listener_state.clone());
2298	        drop(state);
2299	
2300	        // Send history if requested
2301	        if history {
2302	            for transport in self.runtime().get_transports() {
2303	                let event = TransportEvent {
2304	                    kind: SampleKind::Put,
2305	                    transport,
2306	                };
2307	                listener_state.callback.call(event);
2308	            }
2309	        }
2310	
2311	        Ok(listener_state)
2312	    }

2412	    pub(crate) fn broadcast_link_event(
2413	        &self,
2414	        kind: SampleKind,
2415	        transport_zid: ZenohIdProto,
2416	        link: &zenoh_link::Link,
2417	        is_multicast: bool,
2418	        is_qos: bool,
2419	    ) {
2420	        let event = LinkEvent {
2421	            kind,
2422	            link: Link::new(transport_zid.into(), link, is_qos),
2423	        };
2424	
2425	        // Call all registered callbacks, filtering by transport if specified
2426	        let listeners = zread!(self.0.state)
2427	            .link_events_listeners
2428	            .values()
2429	            .cloned()
2430	            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
2431	        for listener in listeners {
2432	            if let Some(filter_transport) = &listener.transport {
2433	                // Filter by both zid and is_multicast
2434	                if filter_transport.zid == event.link.zid
2435	                    && filter_transport.is_multicast == is_multicast
2436	                {
2437	                    listener.callback.call(event.clone());
2438	                }
2439	            } else {
2440	                listener.callback.call(event.clone());
2441	            }
2442	        }
2443	    }

2445	    #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] // TODO fixme
2446	    pub(crate) fn execute_subscriber_callbacks(
2447	        &self,
2448	        local: bool,
2449	        kind: SubscriberKind,
2450	        wire_expr: &WireExpr,
2451	        qos: push::ext::QoSType,
2452	        msg: &mut PushBody,
2453	        historical: bool,
2454	        #[cfg(feature = "unstable")] reliability: Reliability,
2455	    ) {
2456	        let state = zread!(self.0.state);
2457	        if state.primitives.is_none() {
2458	            return; // Session closing or closed
2459	        }
2460	        let callbacks = state.subscriber_callbacks(local, kind, wire_expr, historical);
2461	        drop(state);
2462	        callbacks.call(
2463	            true,
2464	            qos,
2465	            msg,
2466	            #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2467	            reliability,
2468	        );
2469	    }

2471	    #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] // TODO fixme
2472	    pub(crate) fn resolve_put(
2473	        &self,
2474	        key_expr: &KeyExpr,
2475	        payload: ZBytes,
2476	        kind: SampleKind,
2477	        encoding: Encoding,
2478	        congestion_control: CongestionControl,
2479	        priority: Priority,
2480	        is_express: bool,
2481	        destination: Locality,
2482	        #[cfg(feature = "unstable")] reliability: Reliability,
2483	        timestamp: Option<uhlc::Timestamp>,
2484	        #[cfg(feature = "unstable")] source_info: Option<SourceInfo>,
2485	        attachment: Option<ZBytes>,
2486	    ) -> ZResult<()> {
2487	        trace!("write({:?}, [...])", key_expr);
2488	        let state = zread!(self.0.state);
2489	        let primitives = state.primitives()?;
2490	        let wire_expr = key_expr.to_wire(self);
2491	        let mut callbacks = SubscriberCallbacks::default();
2492	        if destination != Locality::Remote {
2493	            callbacks =
2494	                state.subscriber_callbacks(true, SubscriberKind::Subscriber, &wire_expr, false);
2495	        }
2496	        drop(state);
2497	        let timestamp = timestamp.or_else(|| self.0.runtime.new_timestamp());
2498	        let ext_qos = push::ext::QoSType::new(priority.into(), congestion_control, is_express);
2499	        let mut push = Push {
2500	            wire_expr: wire_expr.to_owned(),
2501	            ext_qos,
2502	            ..Push::from(match kind {
2503	                SampleKind::Put => PushBody::Put(Put {
2504	                    timestamp,
2505	                    encoding: encoding.into(),
2506	                    #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2507	                    ext_sinfo: source_info.map(Into::into),
2508	                    #[cfg(not(feature = "unstable"))]
2509	                    ext_sinfo: None,
2510	                    #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
2511	                    ext_shm: None,
2512	                    ext_attachment: attachment.map(Into::into),
2513	                    ext_unknown: vec![],
2514	                    payload: payload.into(),
2515	                }),
2516	                SampleKind::Delete => PushBody::Del(Del {
2517	                    timestamp,
2518	                    #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2519	                    ext_sinfo: source_info.map(Into::into),
2520	                    #[cfg(not(feature = "unstable"))]
2521	                    ext_sinfo: None,
2522	                    ext_attachment: attachment.map(Into::into),
2523	                    ext_unknown: vec![],
2524	                }),
2525	            })
2526	        };
2527	        let has_local_callbacks = !callbacks.is_empty();
2528	        if destination != Locality::SessionLocal {
2529	            primitives.send_push_consume(
2530	                &mut push,
2531	                #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2532	                reliability,
2533	                #[cfg(not(feature = "unstable"))]
2534	                Reliability::DEFAULT,
2535	                !has_local_callbacks,
2536	            );
2537	        }
2538	        if has_local_callbacks {
2539	            #[cold]
2540	            fn call_local(
2541	                callbacks: SubscriberCallbacks,
2542	                push: &mut Push,
2543	                #[cfg(feature = "unstable")] reliability: Reliability,
2544	            ) {
2545	                callbacks.call(
2546	                    true,
2547	                    push.ext_qos,
2548	                    &mut push.payload,
2549	                    #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2550	                    reliability,
2551	                );
2552	            }
2553	            call_local(
2554	                callbacks,
2555	                &mut push,
2556	                #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2557	                reliability,
2558	            );
2559	        }
2560	        // ext_unknown is not touched by routing/callbacks, so it must be empty
2561	        // we let the compiler knows it so it can optimize its drop out
2562	        // (`Vec<ZExtUnknown>::drop` was visible in flamegraph before this change)
2563	        match push.payload {
2564	            PushBody::Put(Put { ext_unknown, .. }) | PushBody::Del(Del { ext_unknown, .. })
2565	                if ext_unknown.is_empty() => {}
2566	            _ => unsafe { hint::unreachable_unchecked() },
2567	        }
2568	        Ok(())
2569	    }

2577	    // Important: this function should be called while state lock is being held, to ensure that
2578	    // on_cancel callback will not be fired until query is registered.
2579	    #[cfg(not(feature = "unstable"))]
2580	    fn register_query_cancellation(
2581	        &self,
2582	        querier_notifier: Option<SyncGroupNotifier>,
2583	        callback: &mut Callback<Reply>,
2584	    ) -> ZResult<()> {
2585	        self.register_callback_drop_notifier(querier_notifier, callback);
2586	        Ok(())
2587	    }
2588	
2589	    #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2590	    fn register_query_cancellation<F>(
2591	        &self,
2592	        cancellation_token: Option<CancellationToken>,
2593	        querier_notifier: Option<SyncGroupNotifier>,
2594	        on_cancel: F,
2595	        callback: &mut Callback<Reply>,
2596	    ) -> ZResult<()>
2597	    where
2598	        F: FnOnce() -> ZResult<()> + Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,
2599	    {
2600	        if let Some(ct) = cancellation_token {
2601	            if let Some(ct_notifier) = ct.notifier() {
2602	                if let Ok(handler_id) = ct.add_on_cancel_handler(on_cancel.clone()) {
2603	                    let session_notifier = self.0.callbacks_drop_sync_group.notifier();
2604	                    callback.set_on_drop(move || {
2605	                        drop(session_notifier);
2606	                        ct.remove_on_cancel_handler(handler_id);
2607	                        drop(ct_notifier);
2608	                        drop(querier_notifier);
2609	                    });
2610	                    return Ok(());
2611	                }
2612	            }
2613	            bail!("Query was cancelled")
2614	        }
2615	
2616	        self.register_callback_drop_notifier(querier_notifier, callback);
2617	        Ok(())
2618	    }

2620	    #[allow(unused_mut)] // for callback drop on undeclare
2621	    #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
2622	    pub(crate) fn query(
2623	        &self,
2624	        key_expr: &KeyExpr<'_>,
2625	        parameters: &Parameters<'_>,
2626	        target: QueryTarget,
2627	        consolidation: QueryConsolidation,
2628	        qos: QoS,
2629	        destination: Locality,
2630	        timeout: Duration,
2631	        value: Option<(ZBytes, Encoding)>,
2632	        attachment: Option<ZBytes>,
2633	        #[cfg(feature = "unstable")] source: Option<SourceInfo>,
2634	        mut callback: Callback<Reply>,
2635	        #[cfg(feature = "unstable")] cancellation_token: Option<CancellationToken>,
2636	        querier_id: Option<EntityId>,
2637	        querier_notifier: Option<SyncGroupNotifier>,
2638	    ) -> ZResult<()> {
2639	        tracing::trace!(
2640	            "get({}, {:?}, {:?})",
2641	            Selector::borrowed(key_expr, parameters),
2642	            target,
2643	            consolidation
2644	        );
2645	        let mut state = zwrite!(self.0.state);
2646	        let consolidation = match consolidation.mode {
2647	            #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2648	            ConsolidationMode::Auto if parameters.time_range().is_some() => ConsolidationMode::None,
2649	            ConsolidationMode::Auto => ConsolidationMode::Latest,
2650	            mode => mode,
2651	        };
2652	        let qid = state.qid_counter.fetch_add(1, Ordering::SeqCst);
2653	        let primitives = state.primitives()?;
2654	        self.register_query_cancellation(
2655	            #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2656	            cancellation_token,
2657	            querier_notifier,
2658	            #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2659	            {
2660	                let s = self.downgrade();
2661	                move || {
2662	                    let _ = s.cancel_query(qid);
2663	                    Ok(())
2664	                }
2665	            },
2666	            &mut callback,
2667	        )?;
2668	
2669	        let nb_final = match destination {
2670	            Locality::Any => 2,
2671	            _ => 1,
2672	        };
2673	        let token = self.0.task_controller.get_cancellation_token();
2674	        self.0
2675	            .task_controller
2676	            .spawn_with_rt(zenoh_runtime::ZRuntime::Net, {
2677	                let session = self.downgrade();
2678	                async move {
2679	                    tokio::select! {
2680	                        _ = tokio::time::sleep(timeout) => {
2681	                            let mut state = zwrite!(session.0.state);
2682	                            if let Some(query) = state.queries.remove(&qid) {
2683	                                std::mem::drop(state);
2684	                                tracing::debug!("Timeout on query {}! Send error and close.", qid);
2685	                                if query.reception_mode == ConsolidationMode::Latest {
2686	                                    for (_, reply) in query.replies.unwrap().into_iter() {
2687	                                        query.callback.call(reply);
2688	                                    }
2689	                                }
2690	                                query.callback.call(Reply {
2691	                                    result: Err(ReplyError::new("Timeout", Encoding::ZENOH_STRING)),
2692	                                    #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2693	                                    replier_id: None
2694	                                });
2695	                            }
2696	                        }
2697	                        _ = token.cancelled() => {}
2698	                    }
2699	                }
2700	            });
2701	
2702	        tracing::trace!("Register query {} (nb_final = {})", qid, nb_final);
2703	        state.queries.insert(
2704	            qid,
2705	            QueryState {
2706	                nb_final,
2707	                key_expr: key_expr.key_expr().into(),
2708	                parameters: parameters.clone().into_owned(),
2709	                reception_mode: consolidation,
2710	                replies: (consolidation != ConsolidationMode::None).then(HashMap::new),
2711	                callback,
2712	                querier_id,
2713	            },
2714	        );
2715	        drop(state);
2716	
2717	        if destination != Locality::SessionLocal {
2718	            let wexpr = key_expr.to_wire(self).to_owned();
2719	            let ext_attachment = attachment.clone().map(Into::into);
2720	            primitives.send_request(&mut Request {
2721	                id: qid,
2722	                wire_expr: wexpr.clone(),
2723	                ext_qos: qos.into(),
2724	                ext_tstamp: None,
2725	                ext_nodeid: request::ext::NodeIdType::DEFAULT,
2726	                ext_target: target,
2727	                ext_budget: None,
2728	                ext_timeout: Some(timeout),
2729	                payload: RequestBody::Query(zenoh_protocol::zenoh::Query {
2730	                    consolidation,
2731	                    parameters: parameters.to_string(),
2732	                    #[cfg(feature = "unstable")]
2733	                    ext_sinfo: source.clone().map(Into::into),
2734	                    #[cfg(not(feature = "unstable"))]
2735	                    ext_sinfo: None,
2736	                    ext_body: value.as_ref().map(|v| query::ext::QueryBodyType {
2737	                        #[cfg(feature = "shared-memory")]
2738	                        ext_shm: None,
2739	                        encoding: v.1.clone().into(),
2740	                        payload: v.0.clone().into(),
2741	                    }),
2742	                    ext_attachment,
2743	                    ext_unknown: vec![],
2744	                }),
2745	            });
2746	        }
2747	        if destination != Locality::Remote {
2748	            self.handle_query(
2749	                zread!(self.0.state),
2750	                true,
2751	                key_expr,
2752	                parameters.as_str(),
2753	                qid,
